x-enumeration-literals.name: Term Loan
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Repayments of loans with a fixed principal and interest schedule over a defined term.

Comment:
Example: €50,000 auto loan with monthly installments of €1,000 for 5 years.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Line
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Repayments on a flexible, reusable credit facility where amounts repaid become available again.

Comment:
Example: €10,000 business credit line; €2,000 repayment replenishes available credit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Overdraft Facility
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Repayments that cover negative balances on accounts up to an approved limit.

Comment:
Example: €500 overdraft repayment on a checking account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Card
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Repayments toward credit card balances or retail financing plans.

Comment:
Example: €250 monthly repayment for a credit card outstanding balance of €1,000.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Term Deposit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Repayment or withdrawal of term deposits before or at maturity.

Comment:
Example: €10,500 returned at maturity after a 12-month term deposit (principal + interest).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Rollover
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Repayment amounts that are part of a rollover arrangement, adjusting principal, interest, or duration.

Comment:
Example: Partial repayment of a short-term loan rolled into a new term.
